channel.title: Voice of the Void
channel.description: Recent content on Voice of the Void

item.title: Should you compress media when uploading them online? - Part 2
Should you compress media when uploading them online? - Part 1
item.description: Here is how you can compress your media with CLI tools or websites.

item.title: Setting up a Personal Blog - So Simple Even Kids Do It
item.description: A guide to create your own personal blog and host it for free

item.title: Setting up Neovim with Lua
item.description: An easy guide to get started with your first neovim setup

item.title: Vim? Even in this era of advanced IDEs?
item.description: How I became a tinkerer by learning Vim

item.title: I Broke My Computer Apart After Taking a Training: Here’s What I Learned.
item.description: The story of how I built a project in 2 weeks without any previous technical knowledge.

item.title: About
item.description: Hi! My name is Void and I am a Software Engineer and has worked on tech domains like web development, game development, workflow automations, CLI tool building, image processing and more. I have also worked as a maths teacher/content developer and also led a team who was incharge of Visual Content Communication. I am fueled by my passion for understanding and learning about tech. Mostly about computer software. I’ll always consider myself as a student and I try to learn whenever possible.
